======================================================================
HOW TO FIX:
  1. Run: python inspect_general.py --fix  (interactive mode)
  2. Or add keywords in TECH_STACKS (config.py) then re-run main.py
  3. After fixing, run: python html_generator.py  to rebuild the report
======================================================================
